name: Coleslaw (Carter Family Favorites)
recipeInstructions:
1. Don't use white or limp cabbage – the slaw won't be worth it.
2. Cut cabbage into quarters and place in a large bowl of well-salted cold water. Soak for at least 1 hour to ensure any unwanted guests are gone.
3. Drain and chop the cabbage finely on a chopping board. Shred apples, celery, and carrots.
4. Add all ingredients to the cabbage shreds. Stir in celery seed, salt, and mayonnaise until well combined.
5. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving to let flavors meld. If transporting, keep chilled to avoid food safety issues.
